1) Reaction decks
Basically teams that don't fit in the other 2 and depend a lot on making the correct decisions to kill a certain unit/buff/debuff. They can be really easy or really hard to play depending on which units they face

2) Combo otk
Basically setting up to kill 1-4 units of the other side in 1 turn. Their mantra is defend/delay/res until ready to pull it off

I think high end meta is more like
Teams with ability to otk or high burst
Teams with specific strats (para, jenkins)
Or some off strat teams from top people

3) Bypass/Negation
These teams use mechanics that bypass relics/normal res like poison triggers/retaliate etc
These require a lot of finesse to play and are sort of hybrid between 1 and 2
No 2 seems to be prevalent but can easily crumble if they cannot pull it off in time or key units die
Poison and bleed do not bypass reinforce
They cut during apllication
That's why they also have negation or dispel
Generally too slow unless paired with burst tbh
The problem with dispel/negation units in traphase is it is quite limited
